name: TCECUR Sweden AB (publ)
summary: TCECUR Sweden AB (publ), through its subsidiaries, develops, installs, operates, and sells security systems and secure communication solutions in Europe. The company offers critical security systems in speech, data, and image; radio systems; access control systems, alarm systems, camera surveillance, and visitor management systems; and burglary and fire alarms. It serves public sector, real estate, and construction companies. The company was formerly known as TC Connect AB (publ) and changed its name to TCECUR Sweden AB (publ) in June 2018. TCECUR Sweden AB (publ) was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.
